context: CLAUDE.md exists with the following sections in this order: (a) hand-written '## Product Vision' section above the bruhs block, (b) an existing bruhs:state block with old skills=['superpowers'], (c) hand-written '## Behavioral Rules' section below the bruhs block with 6 user-authored rules. AGENTS.md exists with similar structure. STATE_JSON now contains skills=['superpowers','shadcn','vercel-react-best-practices'].
expected_behavior: Replaces ONLY the content between <!-- bruhs:state:begin v1 --> and <!-- bruhs:state:end --> in both CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md
Hand-written content above the begin marker is byte-identical before and after the run
Hand-written content below the end marker is byte-identical before and after the run
Both files end up byte-identical to each other inside the bruhs:state block (mirror invariant)
Writes atomically — uses tmp file + os.replace(), never leaves CLAUDE.md in a half-written state if the process is killed
Idempotent: running the script twice with the same STATE_JSON leaves both files byte-identical between runs

Validates STATE_JSON before writing — non-object input, missing 'stack', missing 'tooling', or invalid integrations.linear.mcpServer/team cause exit 2 with a stderr error message AND no file modification
Prints the resolved paths (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md) to stdout on success
If CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md doesn't exist, creates it with a minimal header before appending the block — does NOT crash
If the marker block is absent, appends it under a '## bruhs-managed' heading instead of failing
failure_modes: Rewrites the whole file from scratch, losing hand-written sections
Writes only CLAUDE.md and skips AGENTS.md (or vice versa) — breaks mirror invariant
Re-orders or strips blank lines outside the markers
Writes invalid JSON inside the block without validation
Leaves a half-written CLAUDE.md on crash (no atomic temp file)
Re-running with the same STATE_JSON produces a drifted file (non-idempotent — e.g. duplicates the block, adds extra newlines)
Modifies the file when validation fails (validation must happen before any disk write)
